choices.text: ~10× less boilerplate; declarative account validation; discriminator system; IDL auto-gen + typed TS client. Production standard.
#[account(has_one = authority)] on account + pub authority: Signer<'info>. Anchor verifies account.authority == authority.key() automatically.
Store at init: offer.bump = ctx.bumps.offer; use bump = offer.bump in subsequent constraints. Skips find_program_address iteration (up to 256 hashes); saves thousands CU.

questions.explanation: Cache bump on account; reuse in constraints.

choices.text: #[event] struct + emit!() in instruction. Client subscribes via program.addEventListener. Logged to tx logs; structured event data; lower latency than polling account changes.
try/catch on tx call; expect(err.error.errorCode.code).to.equal('Unauthorized'). Test success + failure for each instruction to catch missing constraints and validate auth bypass attempts.
